description: rust 1.95.0 enabled clippy::map_unwrap_or as an error-by-default lint (denied via RUSTFLAGS=-D warnings in CI). Local rust 1.94 doesn't trigger it; CI does. Replace .map(...).unwrap_or(false) with .is_ok_and(...). Blocks the v0.4.0 release CI.
title: Fix map_unwrap_or clippy lint on doctor.rs (rust 1.95)
